message:
Add nix signal feature and text markup feature flag

- Enable signal feature in nix crate for ftui-pty
- Add markup feature flag to ftui-text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@ publish = false
 [features]
 default = []
 thread_local_cache = []
+markup = []
 
 [dependencies]
 ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout" }
